She's also currently in a relationship withRoman, and they're considered to be the It Couple at their school.

characters.name: Adedayo
characters.description: AdedayoBiographical InformationAge18-20(season 4)GenderMaleEye ColourBrownHair ColourBlackStatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationSinger in the Church ChoirNicknameHot Church Man(byRoman)RelationshipsRomance(s)Eric Effiong(hook-up)PortrayalPortrayerShak BenjaminSeasons4First AppearanceLast AppearanceEpisode 4.2Episode 4.8Adedayois one of the characters inSex Education. He is portrayed byShak Benjamin. Adedayo was born in a very religious family, but despite being gay he doesn't want to abandon religion, which is one of the most important things in his life. That's why he decided to get baptized in his local church. Adedayo attends baptism classes at Eric's church and that's where the two saw each other for the first time. He also attends a queer party at the Moordale Labour Club, where he hooks up with Eric.

characters.name: Anwar Bakshi
characters.description: Anwar BakshiSeason 3Season 2Season 1Biographical InformationFull NameAnwar BakshiAge16-17(seasons 1-2)17-18(season 3)GenderMaleEye ColourBrownHair ColourBlackHeight5'6"(1.64m)StatusAliveCharacter InformationAffiliationThe Untouchables(formerly)OccupationStudent atMoordale Secondary School(seasons1-3)Student at Taylor's Secondary School(season 4)EducationMoordale Secondary School(formerly)Taylor's Secondary SchoolNicknameAn, Babe(byNick)ResidenceMoordale:Bakshi HouseRelationshipsRelationship statusDatingNickFamilyMrs. Bakshi(mother)Unnamed fatherFriendsOlivia Hanan(best friend)Ruby Matthews(former best friend)Romance(s)Nick(boyfriend)Unnamed ex-boyfriendEnemiesUnpopular studentsAimee Gibbs(formerly)Maeve Wiley(formerly)Eric Effiong(formerly)PortrayalPortrayerChaneil KularSeasons1•2•3First AppearanceLast AppearanceEpisode 1Episode 3.7 Anwar Bakshiis one of the main characters in seasons1-3ofSex Education. He is portrayed byChaneil Kular. He is the best friend ofOlivia Hanan, the former best friend ofRuby Matthewsand is the boyfriend ofNick. He is a former member ofThe Untouchables. Inseason 1, Anwar is introduced as part ofthe Untouchablesclique, which makes him one of the most popular students atMoordale Secondary. He is also very open about his sexuality and presents himself as a mean and arrogant person. However, the truth is that he's terrible at opening up and is often trying to push others away by saying rude remarks about them as a coping mechanism. He's alsoEric's crush, who, however rejects him by saying that pretty boys like him aren't Eric's type.

characters.name: Beau
characters.description: BeauBiographical InformationAge18(season 4)GenderMaleEye ColourBrownHair ColourDark BrownStatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent atCavendish CollegeEducationCavendish CollegeRelationshipsRelationship statusSingleFamilyUnnamed fatherFriendsDave(friend)Romance(s)Vivienne Odusanya(ex-girlfriend)EnemiesJackson Marchetti(rival)PortrayalPortrayerReda ElazouarSeasons4First AppearanceLast AppearanceEpisode 4.1Episode 4.8Beauis one of the recurring characters inSex Education. He is portrayed byReda Elazouar. Nothing is really known about Beau throughout the series, other than that he attends  Cavendish College along with some of the former Moordale students. At first, Beau displays a pretty normal behaviour and could actually pass as somebody who’s down to earth and friendly. But throughout season 4, he develops a closer relationship with Vivienne Odusanya and eventually they start dating. However as time grows, Vivienne starts to notice Beau’s overprotective behaviour and soon Jackson becomes aware of this and even warns Viv about his odd behaviour calling him weird. Eventually on exam day, when Viv was seen talking to another classmate before the exam, Beau saw this and approached her. But when Viv dismisses this as just an exam related thing, Beau does not and proceeds to grab her forcefully and make her uncomfortable leading to Viv feeling a bit disturbed.

characters.name: Beryl
characters.description: BerylBiographical InformationGenderFemaleEye ColourBrownHair ColourBlackStatusAliveCharacter InformationResidenceLagos, Nigeria:Her mother's houseRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed motherBeatrice Effiong(sister)Abeo Effiong(brother-in-law)Eric Effiong(nephew)Anthea Effiong(niece)Unnamed niecesPortrayalPortrayerTomi OgunjobiSeasons3Appears inEpisode 3.6Berylis one of the minor characters inSex Education. She is portrayed byTomi Ogunjobi. She'sEric's maternal aunt, who informs her sister,Beatrice, thatEmeka, Beatrice's ex-fiancé will be present at the wedding. Later, during the wedding, she tells Eric the story of his mother and Emeka's love; thattheir motherwas heartbroken when Beatrice didn't marry Emeka and choseAbeoover him.

characters.name: Cal Bowman
characters.description: Cal BowmanSeason 4Season 3Biographical InformationFull NameCal BowmanAge17-18(season 3)18(season 4)GenderNon-binaryEye ColourDark BrownHair ColourBlackBirthdayMarch 21-April 19, 2004Height5'7"(1.70m)StatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent atMoordale Secondary School(season 3)Student atCavendish College(season 4)EducationMoordale Secondary School(formerly)Cavendish CollegeResidenceMinneapolis, United States of America(formerly)Moordale, United Kingdom:Bowman HouseRelationshipsRelationship statusSingleFamilyNicky Bowman(mother)Unnamed fatherFriendsJackson Marchetti(close friend)Roman(friend)Eric Effiong(friend)Vivienne Odusanya(friend)Layla(friend)Romance(s)Aisha Green(hook-up)Jackson Marchetti(kissed; in love with)EnemiesHope Haddon(formerly)PortrayalPortrayerDua SalehSeasons3•4First AppearanceLast AppearanceEpisode 3.1Episode 4.8Cal Bowmanis a secondary character inSex Education, portrayed byDua Saleh. Moordale, United Kingdom: They are a new student atMoordale Secondaryand a bold, artistic character who spendsSeason 3trying to be authentic to themself despite the changes around them, as well as developing a connection withJackson. Due to their original personality, they have a tense relationship withHope, the new principal of Moordale. Eventually, Cal, alongside Jackson and Viv, manage to kick her out of Moordale, ruining her plans of creating a sex-free campus. However, Cal and other students are forced to look for a new school, as after the open day the investors have pulled all of their funding from the school, causing the closure of Moordale Secondary. Furthermore, things between Cal and Jackson are done, as Jackson often still perceives Cal as a girl. However, the two decide to remain friends.
